name: house-medium-artisan
summary: A craftsman's combined workshop and living space — the trade up front, the family behind. Tools, half-finished work, a kettle on the stove.

primary_palette.note: woodworker / leatherworker — the bench is the business
smith's house — smoky front room, forge is the heart
weaver's house — bright window-side loom, thread stock everywhere
emphasize the living half — workshop is peripheral
potter's house — damp-smelling, clay dust in every corner

story_prompts: the master is at work, the apprentice sweeps — ordinary Tuesday
closed for a funeral — tools covered, hearth cold, chairs dragged together
the shop was raided last night — workbench overturned, a valuable commission missing
peak season before market day — every surface covered in work-in-progress
the artisan has passed and the heirs are arguing — half the tools already packed

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: moderate (0.4-0.5) — big shutter-window at front, hearth at back

anti_patterns: don't treat it as a pure workshop OR a pure home — the blend is the point
avoid formal furniture (upholstered chairs, display cases) — this is a working house
no fine wall art — any decor is trade-guild, tools-of-the-trade, or a child's drawing
